resolution: System roll-up now converts FPMH to failures/hour exactly once before MTBF and reliability calculations.

resolution: The planner brackets the monotone chi-square boundary and uses integer binary search for the maximum passing failure count.

resolution: Exact cut-set probability now uses a reduced Shannon BDD; the minimal-cut bound is separately named and a state-limit breach raises instead of changing methods.
residual_or_limitation: Exact evaluation remains subject to an explicit state limit.

resolution: Step-stress equivalent time sums accelerated exposure from every completed step and validates the active stress interval.
residual_or_limitation: None reproduced.

resolution: The likelihood now uses one contribution per unit: true F(U)-F(L) terms only for observed inspection crossings, projected crossings as point inputs, and S(C) for non-crossing units. Delta-method projection intervals are separately labeled display-only uncertainty.
residual_or_limitation: Projection intervals remain first-order delta-method diagnostics rather than a hierarchical measurement-error model; that scope is explicit and does not alter censoring likelihood.

resolution: Part-construction failures now raise MissionCalculationError with part, phase, class, and original exception context.
residual_or_limitation: None reproduced.

resolution: Undefined AICc returns infinity and makes the candidate ineligible for AICc ranking.
residual_or_limitation: BIC and predictive validation retain their own assumptions.

resolution: Hazard and cumulative hazard use log-PDF/log-survival evaluation, preserving extreme-tail identities.
residual_or_limitation: None reproduced for implemented distributions.

resolution: Shared diagnostics require optimizer success, finite parameters/objective/gradient, acceptable projected gradient, and expose boundary contact before fit eligibility. ALT invalid regions now use an excluded finite penalty so Powell interpolation never performs infinity arithmetic.
residual_or_limitation: Warning-as-error ALT fitter and parametric-bootstrap tests pass; no optimizer RuntimeWarning remains in the validated suite.

resolution: Standard and ALT likelihoods now use distribution logpdf/logsf contributions rather than probability floors.
residual_or_limitation: Clipping remains only in plotting or delta-transform guardrails, not the audited likelihood paths.

resolution: Scalar profile-likelihood and refitted parametric-bootstrap intervals are available; mixture and competing-risk reliability can use refitted bootstrap intervals; Wald output is labeled approximate.
residual_or_limitation: Published seeded coverage is a 50-replicate regular complete-sample smoke study, not broad coverage certification.

resolution: KS inference uses a parametric bootstrap that refits the model on every successful replicate and reports calibration details.
residual_or_limitation: Bootstrap validity remains conditional on the fitted family and simulation design.

resolution: Chi-square bins are merged to the expected-count threshold, inference is declined without residual degrees of freedom, and p-values use refitted bootstrap calibration.
residual_or_limitation: None reproduced.

resolution: AGREE weights are normalized after complexity/importance weighting so the series allocation conserves the target.
residual_or_limitation: The implementation documents its target-conserving interpretation of AGREE weighting.

resolution: RBD importance now reports failure criticality using component and system unreliability, with textbook Birnbaum, RAW, and RRW checks.
residual_or_limitation: None reproduced.

resolution: PAND, XOR, and NOT are rejected by the static coherent solver instead of being reduced to incorrect AND/independent-event semantics.
residual_or_limitation: Order-aware dynamic gates still require a separate state-space implementation.

resolution: FTA and RBD now expose an exact latent-event beta-factor common-cause model and disclose the active independence/dependency assumptions.
residual_or_limitation: Only exchangeable all-members shocks are modeled; MGL/alpha-factor partial groups, load sharing, conditional environment, and beta uncertainty remain out of scope.

resolution: Post-burn-in mean residual life uses the closed-form incomplete-gamma infinite tail; the exponential memoryless identity passes.
residual_or_limitation: None reproduced.

resolution: Non-increasing hazards return run-to-failure; wear-out searches expand the range and never label an unqualified boundary minimum as an optimum.
residual_or_limitation: Long-run renewal assumptions remain explicit.

resolution: MCF input requires observation ends or explicit event/censor records; events tied to observation end remain events.
residual_or_limitation: None reproduced.

resolution: MCF uncertainty uses Nelson increments with subject-cluster robust influence variance, log intervals or cluster bootstrap, and effective-risk counts.
residual_or_limitation: Sparse right-tail estimates remain visibly flagged.

resolution: Every named prediction and derating method returns an edition, scope, exclusions, clause coverage, example status, and conformance tier; MIL-HDBK-217F and VITA 51.1 have controlled coverage and parity suites.
residual_or_limitation: Telcordia, 217Plus, FIDES, NSWC, EPRD/NPRD, and named derating tables remain explicitly screening-only.

resolution: Legacy JHEDI/SHERPA/ATHEANA/MERMOS calculators are labeled and routed as screening heuristics; SPAR-H implements PSFs, dependency, and beta uncertainty.
residual_or_limitation: Screening aliases remain for project/API migration and carry warnings.

resolution: Capability returns an explicit stability assessment/status and withholds the capability decision unless stability is demonstrated.
residual_or_limitation: Indices remain visible as diagnostic estimates when the decision is withheld.

resolution: OLS checks matrix rank, identifies aliased terms, and blocks coefficient inference for non-identifiable designs.
residual_or_limitation: None reproduced.

resolution: All PoF endpoints validate finite physical domains and units, return mechanism/validity contracts, and optionally propagate input uncertainty.
residual_or_limitation: Intervals quantify selected input uncertainty, not population reliability or unmodeled mechanism uncertainty.

resolution: Rank-biserial correlation is now 2U_A/(n_A n_B)-1 and the API states the group-A-minus-group-B direction.
residual_or_limitation: None reproduced.

resolution: Repeated-measures ANOVA reports Mauchly, Greenhouse-Geisser, Huynh-Feldt, and lower-bound corrections; mixed analysis uses pooled REML covariance with explicit approximations/fallback.
residual_or_limitation: Mixed-model denominator degrees of freedom remain an explicitly labeled approximation.

resolution: Classical Gage R&R rejects incompatible designs; REML supports unbalanced crossed and nested designs and reports component intervals, rank, convergence, and boundaries.
residual_or_limitation: Observed-information intervals can remain weak near variance boundaries and are flagged.

resolution: SPC separates traceable Phase-I screening from frozen Phase-II baselines and rejects unsupported subgroup sizes instead of clamping constants.
residual_or_limitation: Phase-I exclusions still require assignable-cause review rather than automatic deletion.

resolution: Nonnormal capability compares empirical, Harrell-Davis, fitted-family, and Box-Cox approaches with bootstrap intervals and tail-sufficiency diagnostics.
residual_or_limitation: The fitted-family bootstrap is conditional on the originally selected family and omits selection uncertainty.

resolution: Two-level analysis requires exactly two finite levels and reports mappings, rank, aliases, and estimability; other design classes dispatch to dedicated models.
residual_or_limitation: None reproduced.

resolution: Plackett-Burman generation advertises only verified cyclic/Sylvester constructions, supports up to 63 factors, and checks X'X=N I.
residual_or_limitation: Intermediate requests advance to the next supported run order and disclose capacity.

resolution: Categoricals use fold-fitted one-hot encoding for sklearn estimators and native train-only category/bin handling for CHAID; unknown-category behavior is disclosed.
residual_or_limitation: One-hot unknown categories become an all-zero group as stated.

resolution: SVM/KNN/MLP scaling is inside the training pipeline; convergence is captured; stratified, grouped, and time splits plus calibration/imbalance metrics are selectable.
residual_or_limitation: Comparison is model evaluation, not nested hyperparameter optimization; no tuning claim is made.

resolution: ALT reports transformed-space interpolation/extrapolation, convex-hull position, leverage, common-shape diagnostics, and optional refitted bootstrap use-life intervals.
residual_or_limitation: Non-rejection of common shape is not proof of a common physical failure mechanism.

resolution: Single/dual-stress designs are rank- and condition-checked in model coordinates, harmful directions are constrained, and remote use points receive leverage and uncertainty diagnostics.
residual_or_limitation: Physical direction constraints are conditional on the selected model parameterization.

resolution: Mixture and competing-risk fits use multiple starts and expose effective weight, component separation, collapse, boundary, stability, identifiability, and simpler-model recommendations.
residual_or_limitation: Weakly identifiable fits remain available only as explicitly ineligible diagnostics.

residual_or_limitation: No backward-compatibility ambiguity remains in v2 fields.

resolution: Weibayes supports beta-range sensitivity envelopes and Bayesian beta propagation under an explicit prior.
residual_or_limitation: The Bayesian result remains conditional on the chosen truncated-normal beta prior.

residual_or_limitation: The cumulative Duane regression remains visible as descriptive output.

resolution: A finite-horizon Kijima-II virtual-age simulation models imperfect maintenance and uncertainty; older renewal-rate forecasts explicitly disclose their steady-state approximation.
residual_or_limitation: The simulation is not a capacity-constrained repair-shop or general semi-Markov inventory model.

resolution: Nevada returns retain fractional weights and use grouped interval-censored likelihood; units still in service are right-censored and forecast parameter intervals are exposed.
residual_or_limitation: Reporting-lag, future count variation, and model-selection uncertainty remain excluded and disclosed.

resolution: PoF now compares Paris/Walker/Forman crack growth, Goodman/Soderberg/Gerber mean stress, and linear/nonlinear cumulative damage, with separate model and input sensitivity.
